mapper.select: SELECT user_id, user_name, dept_name, cell_tel, email, user_pc_ip, account, use_flag, is_recv_sms, is_recv_email, auth, pass_date, pass_chg_date FROM com_user ORDER BY user_id
SELECT user_id, user_name, dept_name, cell_tel, email, user_pc_ip, account, use_flag, is_recv_sms, is_recv_email, auth, pass_date, pass_chg_date FROM com_user WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO com_user ( user_id, password, pw_salt, user_name, dept_name, cell_tel, email, user_pc_ip, use_flag, is_recv_sms, is_recv_email, auth, pass_chg_date ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{password}, #{pwSalt}, #{userName}, #{deptName}, #{cellTel}, #{email}, #{userPcIp}, #{useFlag}, #{isRecvSms}, #{isRecvEmail}, #{auth}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
mapper.update: UPDATE com_user SET user_name = #{userName}, dept_name = #{deptName}, cell_tel = #{cellTel}, email = #{email}, user_pc_ip = #{userPcIp}, use_flag = #{useFlag}, is_recv_sms = #{isRecvSms}, is_recv_email = #{isRecvEmail}, auth = #{auth} WHERE user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE com_user SET password = #{hashedPassword}, pw_salt = #{salt}, pass_chg_date = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE user_id = #{userId}
